Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port in component type Q, not visible in the implementation annex -> Remove the assumption statement referencing Data_Sink

no viable alternative at input 'Sporadic': Incorrect syntax for property value in AGREE -> Wrap Sporadic in quotes to make it a string literal
